evals.name: full-population-test
evals.prompt: Agrega 20 pokemones al azar a mi cuenta para probar las cajas.
evals.expected_output: 20 Pokémon should be added to state.box and the game should be saved.

evals.name: diverse-species-test
evals.prompt: puebla mi cuenta con 20 pokemones de diversas especies.
evals.expected_output: The box should contain 20 new Pokémon from different species.
